EGFR C797S.note: acquired resistance to osimertinib. Osimertinib binds Cys797 COVALENTLY, so non-covalent docking cannot capture the resistance this mutation causes -- read osimertinib here with the same caveat as KRAS G12C. Modeled structure (side-chain swap); lower confidence than a crystal.
